results.title: Larry's search history: 'Carbon monoxide death,' 'how to confuse iPhone Find Me app' and 'shot in the heart instant death'
results.description: Larry's search history and messages to online spellcasters were presented in court, which showed that he had spent thousands of dollars on spells to make Maya fall back in love with him.

results.title: Aroldis Chapman wants an apology from Yankees GM Brian Cashman before entertaining potential reunion
results.description: Boston Red Sox closer Aroldis Chapman told ESPN Deportes that he would need Yankees GM Brian Cashman to "apologize first" before accepting a potential trade back to the Bronx, but didn't rule out the possibility of a reunion.

results.title: St. Mary’s, 18-0, stands alone for third straight season
results.description: Joey Barrett NORTH ANDOVER — Beneath the bright lights at Merrimack College, St. Mary’s girls flag football team rose to the occasion Thursday. The Spartans (18-0), who haven’t lost a game in three years, completed their quest for a third consecutive Div. 1 state championship with a 12-6 win against Leominster.
